queries.question: Show me the service that each gate offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Services.serviceName  from Gates_Services join Services on Gates_Services.serviceId = Services.id join Gates on Gates_Services.gateId = Gates.id   GROUP BY Gates_Services.serviceId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Gates_Services.gateId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Gates)

queries.question: Show me the service that each gate offers.
queries.sql: select gates.gatenumber , services.servicename from Gates_Services join Services on Gates_Services.serviceId = Services.id join Gates on Gates_Services.gateId = Gates.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gatenumber ?servicename WHERE {
  ?gates_services a :Gates_Services .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?gates_services p:hasServices ?services .
  ?gates a :Gates .
  ?gates_services p:hasGates ?gates .
  ?gates p:gateNumber ?gatenumber .
  ?services p:serviceName ?servicename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the service that each gate offers.
